---
title: "README: Meu Projeto"
subtitle: "Lorem Ipsum"
author:
  - name: "Enoch Filho (enoches.github.io)"
    url: "https://enoches.github.io"
    orcid: "0000-0002-2489-856X"
date: "2026-04-01"
date-modified: "`{r} Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
  gfm:
    toc: true
    title-block-style: plain
---

<!-- HTML para o site / visualização local.
     GFM para o README.md no GitHub. -->

```{r}
#| label: options
#| include: false

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Projeto-xyz

The goal of Projeto-xyz is to ...

What is special about using `README.qmd` instead of just `README.md`? You can include R chunks like so:

```{r}
#| label: cars
summary(cars)
```

You'll still need to render `README.qmd` regularly, to keep `README.html` up-to-date.

## Plots

You can also embed plots, for example:

```{r}
#| label: pressure
#| echo: false

plot(pressure)
```
